title: Joanie Ngo
compiled_truth: Joanie Ngo is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-21 to 2001-07-16), Joanie Ngo sent 2 and received 181 emails, totalling 183 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (2), [Stacey Neuweiler](people/stacey-neuweiler) (1), [Ami Chokshi](people/ami-chokshi) (1), [Howard Camp](people/howard-camp) (1), [Thu Nguyen](people/thu-nguyen) (1).
